task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback' survey dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey admin interface should display the survey title 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback' at the top or in the active survey context menu.

task_completion.description: Open the edit settings for the 'Session Feedback' question group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the group editing interface with 'Session Feedback' as the group title.

task_completion.description: Configure the relevance equation for the 'Session Feedback' group to check if ATTENDED_SESSIONS is 'Yes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Relevance equation' field for the group should contain logic checking the ATTENDED_SESSIONS question, such as `ATTENDED_SESSIONS == "Y"` or `ATTENDED_SESSIONS.NAOK == "Y"`.

task_completion.description: Open the edit settings for the 'IMPROVE_COMMENTS' question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the question editing interface for the question code 'IMPROVE_COMMENTS' ('What specific improvements would you suggest?').

task_completion.description: Configure the relevance equation for the 'IMPROVE_COMMENTS' question to check if OVERALL_RATING is 6 or below.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Relevance equation' field for the question should contain logic checking the OVERALL_RATING question, such as `OVERALL_RATING <= 6` or `OVERALL_RATING.NAOK <= 6`.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the survey settings (Text elements or General settings) to configure the End URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen should show the survey-level settings menu, specifically the section containing the 'End URL' field.

task_completion.description: Set the survey's End URL to 'http://techsummit.example.com/thank-you'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'End URL' input field must contain exactly 'http://techsummit.example.com/thank-you'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface rather than using curl or direct database commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser with the LimeSurvey admin UI open, not a terminal window executing API or SQL commands.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing target survey rather than creating a new dummy survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The survey title in the UI must be 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback' with the pre-existing questions (ATTENDED_SESSIONS, OVERALL_RATING, IMPROVE_COMMENTS).

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the configured settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'Save' buttons being clicked, success notification toasts (e.g., 'Group saved', 'Question saved'), or the configured values persisting in the UI after saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target survey is 'Annual Tech Summit 2024 — Attendee Feedback'. The group 'Session Feedback' must have a relevance equation checking if 'ATTENDED_SESSIONS' is Yes (value 'Y'). The question 'IMPROVE_COMMENTS' must have a relevance equation checking if 'OVERALL_RATING' is <= 6. The survey's End URL must be set to 'http://techsummit.example.com/thank-you'.
